ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 1234
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

Thank you for booking with SkyBlue Airlines. Here are your flight details:

Flight: SB1234
Date: 15th April 2026
Departure: Delhi (DEL) at 09:30 AM
Arrival: Mumbai (BOM) at 12:15 PM
Seat: 12B
Baggage Allowance: 2 checked bags + 1 carry-on

Check-in opens at 06:00 AM, and boarding starts 45 minutes before departure. Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours prior.

If you need to make changes or have any queries, reply to this email or call our 24/7 support at +91-123-456-7890.

Enjoy your trip!

Best regards,
SkyBlue Airlines Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your QuickBooks account has an outstanding invoice that needs to be settled urgently. Failure to make the payment within 48 hours may result in suspension of your account and loss of access to essential financial services.

Invoice Details:
Invoice No.: QB-56789
Amount Due: INR 12500.00
Due Date: 16th April 2026

Please click the link below to view and pay your invoice:
<URL>

For your reference, the payment can be processed via Net Banking, Credit/Debit Card, or UPI. If you have already made the payment, kindly disregard this notice.

If you have any questions or concerns, reply to this email or call our support line at +91-987-654-3210. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Thank you,
QuickBooks Billing Team
